IGLC.status: Not available - needs to be obtained from literature or NCBI

IGHC.note: Contains full-length wild-type IgG1a, IgG1b, and IgG2 (effector silent) constant regions.

recommendations.IGHC: Available and verified. Recommendation: Use IgG2 for natural effector-silent applications to bypass Merck D151A/N183A patent.
